Fullscape v1.0.0 introduces an immersive now-playing experience for Spicetify.

- Presents artwork, track information, playback controls, optional lyrics, and animated backgrounds in a polished full-screen interface.
- Provides multilingual settings for layout, motion, appearance, controls, lyrics, and updates.
- Supports confirmed and checksum-verified version switching through GitHub Releases.
- Integrates with LyricShiori through the Fullscape bridge identity.
